title: Aimee Lannou
compiled_truth: Aimee Lannou is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-03-26), Aimee Lannou sent 87 and received 343 emails, totalling 430 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (87), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (11), [George Grant](people/george-grant) (6), [Fred Boas](people/fred-boas) (6), [Juliann Kemp](people/juliann-kemp) (5).
